data.name: Bondage Play
data.detailed_description:
Is a visual novel interactive game. Players will take on the role of a beautiful college girl who is curious to accept a mysterious mission. And the first step of the mission was to cuff her hands behind her back...
· Manipulate the heroine to arrive at the agreed place where the mission begins
· Follow the master's command to search for the specified props
· There may be some passers-by on the way, which will trigger the plot
· Finally reach the finish line and complete the task
· 3D perspective
· Exquisite female character modeling
· Unique gameplay
· Rich plot
data.about_the_game:
Is a visual novel interactive game. Players will take on the role of a beautiful college girl who is curious to accept a mysterious mission. And the first step of the mission was to cuff her hands behind her back...
· Manipulate the heroine to arrive at the agreed place where the mission begins
· Follow the master's command to search for the specified props
· There may be some passers-by on the way, which will trigger the plot
· Finally reach the finish line and complete the task
· 3D perspective
· Exquisite female character modeling
· Unique gameplay
· Rich plot
data.short_description: Ting, a female college student, received a strange message. She would receive a generous cash reward for accepting and completing a task. Curious Ting came to the agreed place, open the designated black box is a pair of handcuffs, the first requirement of the task is to ask her to put the cuffs on.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX960
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i7
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX1050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
